name: sourceType
label: Visual Source
help: The human-readable part of the hybrid PDF. The compliant XML is built from the Invoice Data below.

nested.name: html
nested.label: HTML
nested.help: Inline HTML for the visible invoice. Use self-contained markup; external scripts loaded from a CDN can hang the converter.

nested.name: templateId
nested.label: Template ID
nested.help: ID of a saved invoice template from the PolyDoc dashboard.

nested.name: templateData
nested.label: Template Data (JSON)
nested.help: JSON object of variables passed to the Liquid template renderer.

nested.name: url
nested.label: URL
nested.help: URL of the page to render as the visible invoice.

name: eInvoiceStandard
label: Standard
help: The hybrid e-invoice standard to embed.

name: eInvoiceProfile
label: Profile
help: Data granularity profile to validate against.

name: eInvoiceVerify
label: Verify
help: Verify PDF/A and EN 16931 compliance after generation; returns an error if it fails.

name: invoice
label: Invoice Data (JSON)
help: Structured invoice: number, issueDate, currencyCode, seller, buyer, lines, totals. Include payment terms or a due date (rule BR-CO-25) and a seller tax ID for standard VAT. See docs.polydoc.tech for the full schema.

name: delivery
label: Delivery
help: How the generated PDF is returned.

nested.name: presignedUrl
nested.label: Presigned URL
nested.help: HTTP PUT presigned URL from your storage provider (S3 / GCS / Azure).

nested.name: webhookUrl
nested.label: Webhook URL
nested.help: URL the generated PDF is delivered to.

nested.name: webhookOptions
nested.label: Webhook Options (JSON)
nested.help: Extra webhook settings merged with the URL: async, method, headers, retries, retryDelay, timeout.

name: tag
label: Tag
help: Label for logging and analytics (max 30 chars).

name: advanced
label: Advanced (JSON)
help: Raw fields deep-merged into the request body for any API option not exposed above, e.g. layout, pdf.metadata, render.
